program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Implement the ProductContract model surface with stable identifiers, tenant scope, Matter references, status constraints, and audit metadata before AIControlRule is implemented.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P01.M01.S01 in implemented state.
Adds PRODUCT_CONTRACT_MODEL, PRODUCT_CONTRACT_REQUIRED_FIELDS, PRODUCT_CONTRACT_STATUS_VALUES, createProductContract, and validateProductContract.
Adds ProductContract tests for stable pc_ identifiers, tenant scope, status lifecycle, nullable matter_refs, audit metadata, immutable returned records, and fail-closed validation.
Extends the synthetic fixture with a no-real-data ProductContract record.
Records an explicit weighted-ledger generator defer for generic package-layout/ui profile mismatch without hand-editing generated ledger output.
Extends the RP00 validator and README with machine checks for the ProductContract model slice and next subphase boundary.
non_goals: Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not implement AIControlRule, HermesGate, ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, or BlockedClaim.
Does not replace H00, C00, or human approval.
Does not close RP00.P01, RP00, or RP00.P01.M02.S01.
claude_questions: Does RP00.P01.M01.S01 implement ProductContract only, with AIControlRule and the other entities still deferred to later subphases?
Do identifier, tenant-scope, status-lifecycle, Matter-reference, and audit-metadata rules align with the P00 contract shell and type/shape definition?
Does the synthetic ProductContract fixture avoid real data and product-state writes?
Does the validator enforce ProductContract model exports, fixture validation, fail-closed checks, weighted-generator defer evidence, and next boundary RP00.P01.M02.S01?
Can this subphase be promoted after C00 review, adjudication, construction inspection, and final validation without claiming full Domain Model/P01/RP00 completion?
risk_focus: Claiming full Domain Model implementation from the ProductContract-only slice.
Allowing ProductContract records without tenant scope, audit_event_ref, created_at, or updated_at.
Treating nullable Matter references as permission to use real matter data.
Skipping actual Claude C00 review or construction inspection before production_ready.
